name: rustarr-mcp
description: MCP bridge to the rustarr media-automation fleet (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Plex, Jellyfin, qBittorrent, and more) for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: One tool surface for the *arr media fleet
interface.longDescription: MCP server that provides a single, consistent tool surface over a media-automation fleet: Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Tautulli, Overseerr, Bazarr, Lidarr, Readarr, SABnzbd, qBittorrent, Wizarr, Notifiarr, Plex, and Jellyfin. List configured integrations, fetch upstream service status, and proxy safe credentialed GET requests (read) or confirmed POST requests (write) to any configured service. Query-string secrets are rejected; credentials live in config or environment, never in request paths.
defaultPrompt: List the media services configured in rustarr.
Check the status of my Radarr service.
